ComponentType: Single-Cell Lithium-Ion Battery Linear Charger IC
Description: The TP4054 is a complete monolithic constant-current/constant-voltage linear charger for single-cell lithium-ion batteries. It integrates a power MOSFET and thermal regulation, requiring no external blocking diode or sense resistor. Designed for USB power specifications, it features a preset 4.2V charge voltage with ±1% accuracy, programmable charge current up to 500mA, and automatic charge termination when the current drops to 1/10 of the set value. It includes battery reverse-connection protection, under-voltage lockout (UVLO), automatic recharge, and status indication.

KeyParameters.**Input Voltage Range (VCC)**: 4.25V to 6.5V (Operating), Absolute Max: Vss-0.3V to Vss+7V
KeyParameters.**Programmable Charge Current (IBAT)**: Up to 500mA (typ), set by external resistor (RPROG)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Open-drain output. Pulled low during charging, high-impedance when charge is complete or under UVLO. Flashes when no battery is detected (with external capacitor).
Charging current output and voltage sense pin. Connects to the positive terminal of the battery. Provides reverse-connection protection.
Positive input supply pin (e.g., from USB or adapter). Requires a bypass capacitor (≥1µF).
Connect a precision resistor (1% tolerance) to GND to set the charge current (IBAT = 1000 * VPROG/RPROG). Voltage ~1V during CC mode. Can be pulled high (>1.21V) to disable the charger.
